episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 371: March of the Machine Set Review
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and deliver their final verdict on March of the Machine as a set for multiple formats.
